description: This is a 3D model of a simple, modern bed frame with a white mattress. The bed frame is constructed from dark-colored material, likely wood or metal, and features a minimalist design. It has a high headboard and footboard, both with a rectangular panel detail and square finials at the top corners. The side rails are straight and connect the headboard to the footboard, creating a sturdy structure. The mattress is a clean white rectangle, contrasting with the dark frame. The overall aesthetic is clean and unfussy, suitable for various bedroom decor styles.
